Demo runs 4-5 min, creates 3 record types.

title: AI Multi-Channel Support Triage (n8n)
description: 21-node n8n workflow: Claude classifies inbound support tickets by priority, category, churn risk, and VIP status. Routes CRITICAL/URGENT to Slack escalation + agent email; STANDARD to auto-response + digest. Live Sheets logging. Handles enterprise-to-starter tier SLA differentiation.

title: AI Insurance Claims Triage & Document Extraction
description: n8n workflow where Claude extracts structured fields from claim submissions, auto-classifies by severity (routine/elevated/urgent), routes urgent claims to Slack escalation + Salesforce Case creation, and sends auto-acknowledgment emails — targeting the insurance vertical with zero manual review.
metric: Auto-classifies claim severity and routes to correct channel in under 30 seconds
notes: Scored 8/10. Real n8n demo for insurance niche. Claude does structured extraction from unstructured claim text — high SA hiring signal. COVU target demo. Build: ~/projects/n8n-agent/clients/insurance-claims-demo/
note: Card live on jtsomwaru.com under ai-insurance-claims-triage / ai-lead-qualification (added 2026-03-06). Pending_build status was stale orphan.

title: AI Lead Qualification & HubSpot CRM Entry

title: Construction Job Tracker — n8n T2 Template
description: n8n workflow for construction/trades contractors. Foreman sends WhatsApp/SMS daily update → Claude classifies on-track/at-risk/blocked → client auto-notification → Google Sheets job log → owner alert on blockers. Configurable per prospect in ~2 hours. Targeting NYC GCs, HVAC, plumbing, electrical (10-50 employees, $5M-$20M revenue).
metric: Eliminates 30-60 min/day of foreman status calls, automated client updates on every job
notes: Scored 7/10 — auto-approved. Strong T2 pipeline fit. Differentiates from construction-tracker (dashboard) and construction-trades-workflow (invoicing) — this solves job progress communication. Spawn coding agent to add to jtsomwaru.com.

title: PM Maintenance Request Triage — n8n T2 Template
description: n8n automation for NYC property managers. Tenant submits maintenance request → Claude classifies urgency (emergency/urgent/routine) + category (plumbing/electrical/HVAC/structural) → vendor routing from Google Sheet → tenant auto-confirmation → Sheets log → no-show escalation alert.
metric: Eliminates manual maintenance triage — tenant request to vendor dispatch without staff touchpoint

title: Nash Satoshi — 4-LLM n8n Analysis Pipeline
description: Self-hosted n8n workflow powering Nash Satoshi's crypto rankings. 32 nodes, 3-stage pipeline: data ingestion → 4-model parallel scoring (GPT/Gemini/Claude/Grok) → ensemble synthesis. Replaced Gumloop. Webhook-triggered, ~4 min end-to-end. Workflow ID: w0yOfDL4RTLldwSJ.
metric: 32 nodes, 4 LLMs scoring in parallel, ~4 min analysis-to-output, 2 successful test runs
notes: Passive income product. Self-hosted, fully autonomous pipeline. Demonstrates multi-provider LLM orchestration in n8n — strong builder credibility.

title: Glow Index — 4-LLM Ensemble Skincare Rankings Engine
description: Rebuilt Glow Index backend with Python FastAPI + real Brave Search data collection. 4-model ensemble (GPT/Gemini/Claude/Grok) scores products independently, consensus verdict drives rankings. Frontend polished: NaN fix, verdict banner, key findings panel, model name normalization, analysis status page. Last step: n8n workflow + ngrok to go fully live.
metric: 4-LLM ensemble engine rebuilt from scratch, frontend polished and pushed
notes: Passive income app. Score 7/10 (no paid client +0, high-demand skill +3, outcome +1, novel ensemble +2, SA capability +1). Auto-approved.
